candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs and the only clear COGS-like candidate.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line rather than broader operating expense rows.

candidates.why: Core overhead/personnel cost bucket and clearly above operating profit.
Broad overhead bucket consistent with SG&A-style operating expenses, excluding D&A and finance items.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Looks like an SG&A component, but preview indicates it is already included in Employee benefit expenses via the balancing row, so selecting it separately would likely double count.

variables.notes: No explicit populated single SG&A total row exists. Chose overhead buckets. Excluded 'Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' to avoid likely double counting because 'Employee benefit expenses - Balancing value' suggests stock-based compensation is already included in Employee benefit expenses.
No dedicated research and development row appears in the provided income statement preview.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost total, but less preferred than underlying recurring components.
Recurring finance cost component on the income statement, consistent with lease interest.
Could contain recurring finance costs, but is ambiguous and may include non-interest items.
Net finance total including financial income, so less suitable than gross recurring expense components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Clearly an interest expense line, but supplemental and overlaps with income-statement Lease liabilities values.
Best semantic match for interest on borrowings/debt, but it was not included in the preferred candidate list.

variables.notes: Used one row outside the candidate list because the provided candidates miss the clearest core interest-expense component: 'Liabilities measured at amortised cost'. Chose granular recurring finance-cost components instead of broader totals like 'Financial expenses' or 'Net financial expenses'. Excluded 'Other financial expenses' due ambiguity and excluded the supplemental lease-interest row to avoid double counting with 'Lease liabilities'. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Liabilities measured at amortised cost

candidates.why: Best available equity line on the balance sheet; no separate parent-only equity line is shown.
Duplicate capitalization variant of the same total equity line.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is provided, so using total equity as the BE priority list. To avoid double counting, MIB is left empty.
No minority interest/non-controlling interests line appears in the provided balance sheet preview. Since BE uses total equity, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
